MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF GATEWAY MANAGEMENT & REALTY, INC. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR APR-12-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 07 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON APR-18-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 05 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
1:30 PM. C/C FOR JURY TRIAL SETTLEMENT. PLTF PRESENT WITH COUNSEL, RONALD ARLAS. DEFT PRESENT IN PRO PER. A NEGOTIATED DISPO WAS REACHED & TERMS WERE READ INTO THE RECORD. PLTF TO PREPARE STIPJ.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SIMPSON, WILLIAM P. AKA WILLIAM SIMPSON THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 500 BUCHANAN ST, #11, S.F, CA., STAYED UNTIL MAY-04-1994, PL. WAIVES ALL RENT & DAMAGES. PL. RETAINS LAST MO. RENT & SEC. DEP. TOTALLING $690. PREMISES TO BE LEFT IN BROOM CLEAN CONDITION. DEF. SOLE OCCUPANT OF PREMISES. MUTUAL RELEASE OF CLAIMS. IF DEF. PROVIDES PROPER DOCUMENTS, PL.WILL FILE DISM. W/PREJUDICE. SEE FILE FOR COMPLETE JUDGMENT DETAILS.
